messages.content:
Within Infor System
怎么翻译
"Within Infor System" 可以翻译为 "在Infor系统内部"。

Centric Brands has partnered with PacD to perform an assessment on how we are currently packaging goods at the factory and shipping to the DC. Based on these findings Centric has decided to move forward with implementing a new process that includes utilizing a PacD confirmation module that connects with Infor.  This will reduce the amount of space needed to ship product, as well as improve our sustainability footprint
翻译一下这句话
Centric Brands已与PacD合作，对我们目前在工厂打包货物和运送到分销中心的方式进行评估。根据这些发现，Centric决定采取实施新流程的措施，包括利用与Infor连接的PacD确认模块。这将减少运输产品所需的空间，同时改善我们的可持续性足迹。

Effective June 29th 2023, any in scope vendors for PacD are required to utilize the Packaging Confirmation Module within Infor Nexus. Details on the following slides will explain how to navigate this module

In scope Vendor/Factories will be trained on the module to submit packaging details to be reviewed and approved by PacD prior to creating the pack plan in Infor. Vendors should be completing this task 25 days prior to ex factory date. This will be monitored by Centric and will receive a chargeback if vendors do not comply

PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation Requirements
Input requirements
Inner Pack – Individual Bulk Product/Prepack/Retail Packaging
Units, Dimensions . Weight of product and packaging
Outer Pack – Master Carton
Package type
Units per carton
Dimensions, Weight
Attachments
Photos of product and packing per FOLD FIT FILL instructions

自2023年6月29日起，所有PacD范围内的供应商都被要求在Infor Nexus中使用包装确认模块。以下幻灯片中的细节将解释如何操作此模块。

在范围内的供应商/工厂将接受模块培训，以便在Infor中创建包装计划之前向PacD提交包装细节以进行审查和批准。供应商应该在生产日期的前25天完成此任务。Centric将对供应商不遵守此规定进行监管，并进行追回费用。

PacD自定义包装确认要求表格
输入要求
内部包装 - 单个散装产品/预包装/零售包装，单位数、尺寸、产品和包装重量
外部包装 - 主箱，包装类型、每箱单位数，尺寸、重量
附件
产品和包装的照片，与FOLD FIT FILL指示相符。
第一段重新翻译一下，这是未来的时间
自2023年6月29日起，任何适用于PacD的供应商都需要使用Infor Nexus中的包装确认模块。以下幻灯片的详细信息将说明如何操作此模块。

In scope Vendor/Factories will be trained on the module to submit packaging details to be reviewed and approved by PacD prior to creating the pack plan in Infor. Vendors should be completing this task 25 days prior to ex factory date. This will be monitored by Centric and will receive a chargeback if vendors do not comply
翻译
范围内的供应商/工厂将接受该模块的培训，提交包装细节以供PacD审查和批准，然后才能在Infor中创建包装计划。供应商应在出厂日期前25天完成此任务。Centric将监控此事项，如供应商不遵守规定，将收取费用赔偿。
PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation Requirements 怎么翻译成中文，但是不要翻译PacD Custom Form字段
"Packaging Confirmation Requirements" 可以翻译为 "包装确认要求"。
"PacD Custom Form for Packaging Confirmation Requirements" 可以翻译为 "PacD定制包装确认要求表格".
翻译的内容要有PacD Custom Form

好的，以下是翻译：

"Packaging Confirmation Requirements" 可以翻译为 "包装确认要求"。加上 "PacD Custom Form" 后，可以翻译为 "PacD定制包装确认要求表格"。

Package type
Units per carton
Dimensions, Weight
翻译

Package type - 包装类型
Units per carton - 每箱单位数
Dimensions, Weight - 尺寸、重量
